ops.text: RESOLVED (codex quota papercut, same day): the user reset the OpenAI codex limits ~01:35Z 2026-07-16 — the gpt-5.6-sol lane is back; ignore the "exhausted until Jul 22" warning in the previous entry. Standing sub-lesson survives: codex-wrapper agents must run codex exec in the FOREGROUND (a backgrounded codex dies when the wrapper session ends), and a genuine plan-level limit error is not worth automatic retries — check with the account owner first.
